results.title: Senior Data Scientist at Cummins Inc. - United States Remote
highlights:
Senior Data Scientist at Cummins Inc. - United States Remote
...
# Senior Data Scientist
...
🇺🇸 United States – Remote
...
### 📋 Description
...
• Research, design, implement and validate complex algorithms to analyze diverse sources of data to achieve targeted outcomes by leveraging complex statistical and predictive modeling concepts. • Leverage advanced analytics and data science to resolve complex analytical problems using quantitative approaches through a combination of analytical, mathematical and technical skills. • Build analytical machine learning solutions that predict and influence customer operating experience. • Partner with domain experts to verify model capabilities and with IT resources to enable appropriate data flow/data model development using appropriate tools/technology, rapid prototyping and inform the design of analytical products. • Identify relationships with patterns in data by using a suite of data exploration and data visualization techniques using tools such as PowerBI, R Shiny, SAS JMP and extracts insights into multivariate data by applying principles of multivariate data mining, small sample statistical inferential tests, dimension reduction techniques to understand the underlying structure of the data and enable sound conclusions upon model building. • Synthesize current business intelligence or trend data to support recommendations for action. • Develop applications for a Cloud-based environment and data extraction tools from a variety of sources using experience with Big Data technologies including SQL query language, Java, Python and C++. • Collect business intelligence data from available industry reports, public information, field reports, or purchased sources. • Identify and analyze industry or geographic trends with business strategy implications. • Generate standard or custom reports summarizing business, financial, or economic data for review by executives, managers, clients, and other stakeholders. • Create business intelligence tools or systems, including design of related databases, spreadsheets, or outputs. • Conduct or coordinate tests to ensure that intelligence is consistent with defined needs. • Analyze complex automotive and commercial vehicle business systems, industry requirements and data regulations. • Process and manage large data sets for vehicle and engine systems. • Perform comprehensive Requirements Analysis to evaluate relationships and interdependencies between requirements based upon their complexity and value to the business in order to determine feasibility and prioritization. • Utilize Agile software development methodologies to manage projects such as software development and advanced analytics product development to increase productivity and deliver products that meet value to customers.
...
### 🎯 Requirements
...
• Master’s degree in Computer or Data Science, or related field and 3 years of experience as a Data Analyst or Scientist, or related position. • Alternatively, the employer will accept a Bachelor’s degree in Computer or Data Science, or related field and 5 years of experience as a Data Analyst or Scientist, or related position. • Experience to include: Statistical and predictive modeling concepts; Building analytical machine learning solutions; Data visualization techniques using tools such as PowerBI, R Shiny, SAS JMP; Multivariate data mining; Develop applications for a Cloud-based environment; Big Data technologies including SQL query language, Java, Python and C++; Analyze complex business systems, industry requirements and data regulations; Requirements Analysis; Agile software development methodologies.
...

results.title: Cummins Recruitment 2026: Student - IT (Internship) | Pune | OffCampusJobs4u.com
highlights:
# Cummins Recruitment 2026: Student – IT (Internship) | Pune
...
## Cummins Recruitment 2026:
...
Cummins Inc. is looking for a driven and talented individual for the Student – IT role based in Pune, India. This internship is an excellent opportunity for final-year B.Tech students to dive deep into data science, machine learning, and AI systems. If you have a strong grasp of Python, data structures, and ML frameworks, and are looking for direct mentorship from experienced AI engineers, check the details below and apply to shape your future with a global leader in innovative technology.
...
## Cummins Recruitment 2026 – Details Overview
...
| Job Parameters | Official Specifications |
| --- | --- |
| Company Name | Cummins Inc. |
| Job Role | Student – IT (Intern) |
| Qualification | Final year B.Tech (CS, IT, Data Science, or similar) |
| Experience Required | Fresher / Student |
| Work Location | Pune, Maharashtra |
| Employment Type | Internship (On-site with Flexibility) |
...
Description & Respons
...
As an IT Student Intern at Cummins, you will work closely with software and AI teams. Your primary responsibilities will include:
...
- Data Prep: Cleaning, processing, and analyzing raw datasets to prepare them for modeling.
- Model Training: Assisting in the development and fine-tuning of Machine Learning models (classification, regression) and modern AI systems (NLP/LLMs).
- Evaluation: Tracking performance metrics (such as F1-score and AUC-ROC) and optimizing model accuracy.
- Integration: Working with software development teams to deploy models via APIs seamlessly into application workflows.
...
## Required Qualifications & Skills
...
- Eligibility: Must be a Final year (4th Year) B.Tech student majoring in Computer Science, IT, Data Science, or a related engineering stream.
- Coding: Strong proficiency in Python with hands-on experience using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-Learn.
- Frameworks: Practical project experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow.
- Databases: A solid understanding of SQL for effective data extraction and manipulation.
- Core Theory: A good grasp of data structures, algorithms, probability, and statistics.
- Nice-to-Haves: Experience with LLMs, Hugging Face, LangChain, Git/GitHub version control, and Docker basics.
...
Perks & Benefits: This internship provides direct mentorship from experienced AI engineers and continuous learning opportunities. Exceptional performers may also be considered for a Pre-Placement Offer (PPO)!
...
Are you ready to innovate with Cummins? Eligible final-year B.Tech students can apply for this exciting opportunity by submitting their profiles through the official Cummins career portal linked below.
...
### Who is eligible to apply for the Student – IT role at Cummins?
...
Final-year (4th-year) B.Tech students from Computer Science, Information Technology, Data Science, or related engineering streams are eligible to apply.
...
### What are the primary technical skills required?
...
Candidates should have strong Python coding skills, experience with Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-Learn, SQL, and practical knowledge of ML frameworks like PyTorch or TensorFlow.
...
###### Apply Link: Click Here to Apply for Cummins
...

• Leads projects for design, development and maintenance of a data and analytics platform. • Effectively and efficiently process, store and make data available to analysts and other consumers. • Works with key business stakeholders, IT experts and subject-matter experts to plan, design and deliver optimal analytics and data science solutions. • Works on one or many product teams at a time. • Designs and automates deployment of our distributed system for ingesting and transforming data from various types of sources (relational, event-based, unstructured). • Designs and implements framework to continuously monitor and troubleshoot data quality and data integrity issues. • Implements data governance processes and methods for managing metadata, access, retention to data for internal and external users. • Designs and provides guidance on building reliable, efficient, scalable and quality data pipelines with monitoring and alert mechanisms that combine a variety of sources using ETL/ELT tools or scripting languages. • Designs and implements physical data models to define the database structure. • Optimizing database performance through efficient indexing and table relationships. • Participates in optimizing, testing, and troubleshooting of data pipelines. • Designs, develops and operates large scale data storage and processing solutions using different distributed and cloud based platforms for storing data (e.g. Data Lakes, Hadoop, Hbase, Cassandra, MongoDB, Accumulo, DynamoDB, others). • Uses innovative and modern tools, techniques and architectures to partially or completely automate the most-common, repeatable and tedious data preparation and integration tasks in order to minimize manual and error-prone processes and improve productivity. • Assists with renovating the data management infrastructure to drive automation in data integration and management. • Ensures the timeliness and success of critical analytics initiatives by using agile development technologies such as DevOps, Scrum, Kanban Coaches and develops less experienced team members.

As a Lead Data Scientist in the Health, Safety, and Environment (HSE) domain, you specialize in building innovative AI solutions using Generative AI and advanced data analytics. ...
As a dedicated Data Science graduate from Indiana University Bloomington, I have cultivated a strong foundation in analytical and computational skills. My academic journey has been marked by a deep interest in data analytics, machine learning, and cloud technologies. I consistently strive for excellence, which is reflected in my academic achievements, including successful completion of certifications like AZ-900, DP-900, and AI-900, showcasing my proficiency in Azure cloud services. In my professional career as a Software Engineer at Capgemini, I have accumulated two years of extensive experience in software development and data engineering. During my tenure, I have successfully deployed over 50 enhancements and resolved more than 1000 client tickets, significantly improving operational efficiency. I have also led a cloud migration project, transitioning on-premise servers to Azure, which reduced downtime by 30% and boosted system reliability. My role has enabled me to develop expertise in.NET, SQL Server, Azure, and DevOps practices, all while driving continuous service improvements and enhancing client satisfaction. Looking ahead, I aim to leverage my combined knowledge in software engineering and data science to drive impactful projects that harness the power of data for business growth. My career goal is to transition into a data engineering role, where I can participate in projects that integrate advanced analytics and cloud computing solutions to solve complex business challenges. I am particularly interested in exploring opportunities that focus on big data technologies, predictive analytics, and AI-driven solutions. I am always open to connecting with like-minded professionals and exploring collaborative opportunities. Feel free to reach out to me at agarkhedaditya@gmail.com or connect with me here on LinkedIn. Daimler Truck North America is pioneering the enhancement of products and processes through artificial intelligence. As an AI Software Architect for Driver Experience, you'll define and develop AI use cases, document experiences, and showcase AI technologies to improve the Driver Experience department. Responsibilities Define and develop AI use cases with the global Driver Experience development team Document experiences, lessons learned, and solutions for the global team Showcase AI technologies and possibilities to Driver Experience and DTNA teams Research AI trends and evaluate applicability to Driver Experience use cases Organize AI initiative pipeline for the Driver Experience department Skills Bachelors degree in Engineering, Computer Science or similar field and 0-2 years of experience is required Strong fundamentals in software development Ability to communicate technical concepts clearly to both engineers and non-technical stakeholders Ability to build relationships and collaborate with peers Proven ability to rapidly learn and apply new technologies Initiative and ownership of your area of responsibility Comfort with ambiguity and willingness to tackle problems outside your immediate expertise An attached resume is required Experience in automotive or commercial vehicle industry Experience with AI/ML technologies Experience with LLMs, prompt engineering Demonstrated passion for AI evangelism and problem solving through AI Benefits Annual bonus program 401k company contribution with company match up to 6% as well as non-elective company contribution of 3 - 7% depending on age Starting at 4 weeks paid vacation 13+ calendar holidays 8 weeks paid parental leave Employee assistance program Comprehensive healthcare plans and wellness programs Onsite fitness (at some locations) Tuition assistance Volunteer paid time off Short-term and long-term disability plans Company Overview Daimler Truck North America, a Daimler Truck AG company, is the largest heavy-duty truck manufacturer in North America and a leading producer of medium-duty trucks and specialized commercial vehicles. ### AI Data Analyst Agent - Conversational Insight Engine (LangGraph + LangChain + LLM | Gemini)
...
Built an intelligent Data agent that acts as a "Virtual Data Scientist," allowing users to analyze datasets via plain English queries. Engineered a Stateful Graph Architecture using LangGraph to orchestrate a cyclic "Plan-Code-Execute-Correct" workflow, enabling the system to autonomously generate, run, and fix Python code. Integrated Google Gemini 2.5 for high-precision reasoning over data schemas and automated visualization generation (Seaborn/Matplotlib). Solved the challenge of "hallucinated code" by implementing a feedback loop that captures execution errors and re-prompts the LLM for self-correction. Tech Stack: Python, LangGraph, LangChain, Google Gemini API, Pandas, Seaborn. Show less
...
### AI | Machine Learning | LLM (LangGraph, LangChain) | RAG | Projects
...
A growing collection of hands-on projects focused on Agentic AI, Large Language Models (LLMs), and Machine Learning. This repository showcases real-world applications ranging from traditional classification/regression to autonomous multi-agent systems. It features implementations using LangGraph, LangChain, Python, Scikit-learn, and TensorFlow. Key topics cover LLM fine-tuning, RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and complex orchestration pipelines, demonstrating the bridge between static models and intelligent reasoning engines. There's something in the air right now about tokenomics, token-maxxing, etc. 

So, we've been experimenting with a new metric for measuring the conversion of tokens to work output to enterprise value. It gives us a way to track the value of AI use cases, agents, pilots, etc. I'm calling it Levelized Cost of Intelligence (LCOI). 

I then went and tested it on an internal use case that had been a pretty focused effort and celebrated (with good reason). The metric worked, it could be applied effectively to real enterprise use cases and data to calculate the cost/benefit ratio down to token usage and energy usage.

results.title: Happiest Minds GenAI Engineer Recruitment 2026 | 2025 & 2026 Freshers Apply - NextGenKodingHub
highlights:
Happiest Minds is inviting applications for the role of Engineer – GenAI in Security at its office. This exciting opportunity is designed for 2025 and 2026 BE/B.Tech graduates who are passionate about Artificial Intelligence, Large Language Models (LLMs), Python programming, and Generative AI application development. Candidates eager to build real-world AI solutions and work with cutting-edge technologies are encouraged to apply.
...
As a GenAI Engineer, you will work alongside experienced AI engineers to develop intelligent applications powered by Generative AI. The role offers hands-on exposure to Python, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), vector databases, REST APIs, and cloud platforms while contributing to enterprise AI solutions. This position is ideal for fresh graduates who want to build a career in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and AI Security.
...
| Company Name | Happiest Minds |
| --- | --- |
| Role | Engineer – GenAI in Security |
| Qualification | BE/B.Tech – Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or Related Fields |
| Experience | Freshers |
| Eligible Batch | 2025 & 2026 Pass-outs |
| Salary | ₹6–10 LPA (Estimated) |
| Job Type | Full-Time |
| Work Mode | Work From Office |
...
The GenAI Engineer will contribute to the design, development, and deployment of AI-powered applications using modern Generative AI technologies. The role focuses on building intelligent solutions using Large Language Models (LLMs), Python, prompt engineering, LangChain, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and REST APIs while collaborating with senior AI engineers and product teams.
...
- Contact Us
...
- Develop AI-powered applications using Python.
- Build and integrate Large Language Model (LLM) solutions using frameworks such as LangChain.
- Create effective prompt engineering strategies to improve AI responses.
...
- Develop REST APIs using FastAPI or Flask.
...
- Build and maintain Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines.
- Work with vector databases for AI application development.
- Integrate AI models with enterprise applications and web platforms.
...
- Test, debug, optimize, and maintain AI-powered applications.
...
- BE/B.Tech in Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related disciplines.
- 2025 or 2026 graduates are eligible to apply.
- Strong programming knowledge in Python.
- Basic understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI.
- Knowledge of Prompt Engineering concepts.
...
- Understanding of REST API development.
...
- Exposure to LangChain, Langfuse, or similar AI frameworks.
- Knowledge of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), embeddings, and vector databases such as ChromaDB or Pinecone.
- Experience with FastAPI or Flask.
- Understanding of Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud Platform.
- Internships or academic projects related to AI/ML or Generative AI.
- Python, AI, Machine Learning, or LLM certifications.
- GitHub portfolio showcasing AI projects.
- Participation in hackathons or open-source projects.
...
Interested candidates can apply through the official Happiest Minds Careers portal. Before submitting your application, ensure your resume highlights your Python skills, AI/ML projects, internships, certifications, GitHub profile, hackathon participation, and any experience with LLMs, LangChain, RAG, or cloud platforms.
...
BE/B.Tech graduates from Computer Science, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science, or related fields who are part of the 2025 or 2026 graduating batches are eligible to apply. Candidates with AI/ML projects or internships will have an added advantage.
...
The role requires strong knowledge of Python, Large Language Models (LLMs), Prompt Engineering, REST APIs, Git, and Generative AI concepts. Knowledge of LangChain, RAG, vector databases, FastAPI, Flask, AWS, Azure, or GCP is considered a valuable addition.
